intent: Analyse a CITE-seq dataset (paired RNA + ADT/protein). Use a small public CITE-seq dataset (e.g. 10x's 5k/10k PBMC CITE-seq, or a muon/scanpy built-in if available). Load BOTH modalities (muon/MuData), QC + normalize each (CLR for the ADT, standard for RNA), cluster, and show a UMAP coloured by cluster with a few key ADT markers overlaid.

content.text: Analyse a CITE-seq dataset (paired RNA + ADT/protein). Use a small public CITE-seq dataset (e.g. 10x's 5k/10k PBMC CITE-seq, or a muon/scanpy built-in if available). Load BOTH modalities (muon/MuData), QC + normalize each (CLR for the ADT, standard for RNA), cluster, and show a UMAP coloured by cluster with a few key ADT markers overlaid.

scenario: Cold-start (single prompt): analyse a CITE-seq dataset (paired RNA+ADT) using a small PUBLIC dataset (10x 5k/10k PBMC CITE-seq or muon built-in); muon/MuData, CLR for ADT + standard RNA, cluster, UMAP w/ ADT markers. No local data — agent must fetch. Re-runnable as-is.
